extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Adam attacked 5km out on Vallter 2000, dropped KUSS Sepp in final 1500m after Sepp's premature attack on flatter terrain.
tactical_patterns: CARAPAZ Richard sacrificed himself marking VALVERDE and QUINTANA multiple attacks below 8km, protecting YATES/PORTE GC positions while conceding own time.
Jumbo-Visma and QuickStep pacing for Ineos on flat with 45km left handed DENNIS/CASTROVIEJO advantage, tactical error when YATES beats breakaway regardless.
KUSS Sepp attacked YATES prematurely on flatter section 5km out instead of waiting, cost him in final 1500m above 2000m altitude.
THOMAS Geraint finishing 4th 30sec back signals Tour form returning, signature last-kilometer attack pattern reappearing at altitude.

rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: dropped KUSS above 2000m in final 1500m, controlled pace rather than early attack, taking 45sec GC lead
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: worked as domestique marking VALVERDE/QUINTANA attacks sacrificing own GC at -52sec, multiple surges cost him time
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: negative: attacked too early on flatter terrain 5km out, unable to sustain above 2000m where altitude should suit him
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: attacked multiple times from 8km forcing CARAPAZ responses, finished 3rd at +19sec in best climbing form in years
rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: positive: attacked 4.5km out unseen, closed 7sec gap to within 100m of YATES, finished 2nd only 13sec back
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: 4th at +30sec with signature last-kilometer attack signals Tour form, protecting podium position at +45sec GC
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: sat in wheels while CARAPAZ marked attacks, 8th limiting losses while YATES takes time on rivals
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: lost leader's jersey conceding 50sec to YATES, now only 3sec ahead of THOMAS in 4th overall
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: negative: dropped immediately with over 10km remaining on false-flat section, surprising weakness for climber
rider_signals.ARENSMAN Thymen: neutral: best climber in breakaway but swallowed by peloton, DSM lacking firepower to sustain 10min advantage
